_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Analyze existing and planned data investments to ensure they address key business problems, are compatible with the organization's mission, and align with the target data architecture.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain the enterprise data and AI strategy, aligned to business objectives, with defined investment priorities, milestones, accountability assignments, and success metrics.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-A-001 (DQ, cosine: 0.643), DA-T-001 (DA, cosine: 0.616).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.630). Shared vocabulary: [business, data]. DCWF-only terms [address, align, analyze, architecture, compatible, ensure] vs WIDAI-only terms [accountability, ai, aligned, assignments, defined, develop] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.889 (P=0.891, R=0.887). Balanced P/R — the 26-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Analyze existing and planned data investments to ensure they address key busines" and "Develop and maintain the enterprise data and AI strategy, aligned to business ob" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.645 ≈ STS 0.630 (gap 0.015). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [business, data] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.8%. Shared tokens: [business, data]. DCWF-only: [address, align, analyze, architecture, compatible, ensure]. WIDAI-only: [accountability, ai, aligned, assignments, defined, develop].
